onboarding.chooseProviderDesc: Then continue to enter your API key
onboarding.enterApiKeyDesc: Sign in at {{name}}, create a key, and paste it below
onboarding.overwriteDesc: Manual setup will overwrite model and Agent settings in ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json. To keep the existing config, use the import button above.

onboarding.settingUpHint: Saving configuration and preparing OpenClaw. This may take a while. The Gateway keeps starting in the background.
